Onyx Autotest retesting enforced review-ldiskfs session. Requested by Stephen Guminski because of LU-8804 The following test requirements were specified: trivial=true

Patch Set 5:

(1 comment)

Patch Set 5: Code-Review-1

(40 comments)

Nothing technically wrong with this patch, but IMHO the "one value per line" initialization of long_opt[] just takes up too much space to make it easily read.

I'd prefer to have one parameter per line for getopt arguments so that it is easy to see the ".val" (short option) fields aligned at the end, possibly only with very rare exceptions if the long option is over 15 characters and does not fit, or if there is a .flag initializer (which can be on the next line by itself).

Patch Set 5:

Thanks for the feedback, John and Andreas.  I'll start working on an updated patch immediately.  As I've been looking through the code, it seems that the predominant style is to have all initializer assignments on a single line as long as they fit within the 80 columns.  Unless you have a strong objection, John, I'm going to follow the suggestion to have the assignments on a single line.

Patch Set 5: Verified+1

Tests uploaded by Onyx Autotest from onyx-42vm1 for review-ldiskfs received by maloo, run on Red Hat Enterprise Linux Server 7.3/x86_64: (https://testing.hpdd.intel.com/test_sessions/bb1bd54c-a524-11e6-b06a-5254006e85c2). Ran 4 tests. No failures.

Patch Set 5:

> As I've been looking through the code, it seems that the predominant style is to have all initializer assignments on a single line as long as they fit within the 80 columns.

I don't care about the getopt long options. But everywhere else please do make it one assignment per line. That's our style but many of the developers are lazy about it.

Patch Set 5:

Thanks for the clarification, John.  I'll use one line per assignment for initializers other than getopt.

commit.subject: LU-6210 utils: Change positional struct initializers to C99
commit.message:
LU-6210 utils: Change positional struct initializers to C99

This patch makes no functional changes.  Struct initializers in the
utils directory that use C89 or GCC-only syntax are updated to C99
syntax.  Whitespace is corrected to match the coding style guidelines.
Variables of type struct option have been renamed to long_opts for
consistency.

The C99 syntax prevents incorrect initialization if values are
accidently placed in the wrong position, allows changes in the struct
definition, and clears any members that are not given an explicit
value.

The following struct initializers have been updated:

utils/gss/gssd.c:
	struct sembuf op (2 occurrences)
utils/gss/lgss_sk.c:
	static struct option long_opt[]
utils/gss/lsupport.c:
	static struct convert_struct converter[]
	static struct user_mapping mapping
utils/gss/svcgssd_mech2file.c:
	static const struct oid2mech o2m[]

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Steve Guminski <stephenx.guminski@intel.com>
